# Contributing to Diffopotamus

Thank you for your interest in contributing 🤗! This document provides guidelines and steps for contributing to the project.

## Conventional Commits

This project uses [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) for automated versioning and releases. Please format your commit messages accordingly:

```bash
git commit -m "feat(core): improve rendering performance"
git commit -m "fix(slider): resolve touch handling on mobile"
git commit -m "docs: update README with examples"
```
